{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Logistics Assistant (Grain)",
  "description": "Flour Mills of Nigeria Plc has been a part of the lives of Nigerians at home and abroad. Our global vision is to be a leading food company in Africa providing high-quality and affordable products in the most convenient ways to consumers through world-class brands like Golden Penny Flour, Golden Penny Semovita, Goldenvita, Golden Pasta, and Golden Noodles. The Company&#39;s flagship brand, Golden Penny, remains one of the best-known and the preferred brands amongst bakers, confectioneries, and consumers in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Assistant (Grain)

Job Location: Apapa, Lagos State

Purpose


	Support logistics and dispatch operations by coordinating shipments, maintaining accurate records, and ensuring timely delivery of goods in compliance with company policies and procedures


The Job?


	Coordinate inbound and outbound shipments to ensure timely and accurate deliveries.
	Track shipments and provide updates to stakeholders on delivery status while resolving delays where necessary.
	Prepare and maintain logistics documentation including invoices, shipping records, and inventory reports.
	Liaise with transporters, warehouse teams, and suppliers to ensure efficient logistics operations.
	&nbsp;Monitor inventory levels and assist with stock reconciliation to prevent discrepancies.
	Ensure compliance with safety regulations, company policies, and industry standards in logistics operations.
	Support the logistics team in resolving transportation issues and optimizing delivery routes.
	Verify shipment details and reconcile discrepancies with suppliers and transporters.
	Maintain proper filing and documentation of logistics records and reports.
	Assist in preparing logistics performance reports on efficiency, costs, and operational improvements.


The Person Must?


	Demonstrate strong organizational and multitasking skills.
	Possess good problem-solving ability to address logistics and transportation challenges.
	Be proficient in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word, Outlook).
	Have strong attention to detail in managing logistics documentation.
	Possess good communication and interpersonal skills for coordinating with internal and external stakeholders.


Qualification


	Minimum of OND in a related field.


Experience:?


	Minimum of 2 years&rsquo; relevant experience in internal control, audit, compliance, or risk management, preferably within a manufacturing or FMCG environment.

Logistics Assistant (Grain) Job at Flour Mills of Nigeria Plc




        
    

        
        Flour Mills of Nigeria Plc has been a part of the lives of Nigerians at home and abroad. Our global vision is to be a leading food company in Africa providing high-quality and affordable products in the most convenient ways to consumers through world-class brands like Golden Penny Flour, Golden Penny Semovita, Goldenvita, Golden Pasta, and Golden Noodles. The Company's flagship brand, Golden Penny, remains one of the best-known and the preferred brands amongst bakers, confectioneries, and consumers in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Assistant (Grain)

Job Location: Apapa, Lagos State

Purpose
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Support logistics and dispatch operations by coordinating shipments, maintaining accurate records, and ensuring timely delivery of goods in compliance with company policies and procedures


The Job?


	Coordinate inbound and outbound shipments to ensure timely and accurate deliveries.
	Track shipments and provide updates to stakeholders on delivery status while resolving delays where necessary.
	Prepare and maintain logistics documentation including invoices, shipping records, and inventory reports.
	Liaise with transporters, warehouse teams, and suppliers to ensure efficient logistics operations.
	 Monitor inventory levels and assist with stock reconciliation to prevent discrepancies.
	Ensure compliance with safety regulations, company policies, and industry standards in logistics operations.
	Support the logistics team in resolving transportation issues and optimizing delivery routes.
	Verify shipment details and reconcile discrepancies with suppliers and transporters.
	Maintain proper filing and documentation of logistics records and reports.
	Assist in preparing logistics performance reports on efficiency, costs, and operational improvements.


The Person Must?


	Demonstrate strong organizational and multitasking skills.
	Possess good problem-solving ability to address logistics and transportation challenges.
	Be proficient in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word, Outlook).
	Have strong attention to detail in managing logistics documentation.
	Possess good communication and interpersonal skills for coordinating with internal and external stakeholders.


Qualification


	Minimum of OND in a related field.


Experience:?


	Minimum of 2 years’ relevant experience in internal control, audit, compliance, or risk management, preferably within a manufacturing or FMCG environment.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Agency Manager",
  "description": "At Brit Properties Nigeria Limited,we go beyond mere land sales; we specialize in constructing legacies. From the initial embrace within our fold, we embark on a collaborative journey to shape your future. Understanding your vision, dissecting your desires, and translating them into concrete possibilities are the pillars of our partnership.

Your dreams need not linger in the realm of distant aspirations. With Brit Properties Nig Limited, they metamorphose into tangible realities. Serving as the conduit between aspiration and accomplishment, we act as catalysts, turning dreams into keys that open the doors to your personalized sanctuary.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Agency Manager

Job Location: Uyo, Akwa Ibom&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Recruit, train, retain, and manage at least 4 competent unit managers.
	Recruit, train, retain, and manage at least 20 sales executives.
	Drive sales initiatives, activities, strategies, and sales plans required to build brand visibility to ensure the agency achieves its set targets.
	Ensure the monthly target for the team is met and exceeded.
	Make excellent sales monthly.


Requirements


	B.Sc / HND qualification
	Minimum of 5 years of sales experience in the Real Estate or Insurance sector
	Minimum of 3 years as a Sales Manager in the Real Estate or Insurance Sector
	Interpersonal Skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: jahswill.mbna@britproperties.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Agency Manager Job at Brit Properties Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        At Brit Properties Nigeria Limited,we go beyond mere land sales; we specialize in constructing legacies. From the initial embrace within our fold, we embark on a collaborative journey to shape your future. Understanding your vision, dissecting your desires, and translating them into concrete possibilities are the pillars of our partnership.

Your dreams need not linger in the realm of distant aspirations. With Brit Properties Nig Limited, they metamorphose into tangible realities. Serving as the conduit between aspiration and accomplishment, we act as catalysts, turning dreams into keys that open the doors to your personalized sanctuary.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Agency Manager
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Uyo, Akwa Ibom 
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Recruit, train, retain, and manage at least 4 competent unit managers.
	Recruit, train, retain, and manage at least 20 sales executives.
	Drive sales initiatives, activities, strategies, and sales plans required to build brand visibility to ensure the agency achieves its set targets.
	Ensure the monthly target for the team is met and exceeded.
	Make excellent sales monthly.


Requirements


	B.Sc / HND qualification
	Minimum of 5 years of sales experience in the Real Estate or Insurance sector
	Minimum of 3 years as a Sales Manager in the Real Estate or Insurance Sector
	Interpersonal Skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Transport Admin Manager

Job Location: Ajah, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
Strategic Planning and Coordination:


	Develop and implement transport strategies aligned with organizational goals.
	Coordinate transportation activities to ensure efficient and cost-effective operations.
	Monitor and evaluate the performance of transport operations and make improvements as necessary.


Fleet Management:


	Oversee the acquisition, maintenance, and management of the company&rsquo;s vehicle fleet.
	Ensure regular vehicle inspections, maintenance, and repairs are performed.
	Manage vehicle registration, insurance, and compliance with legal and safety regulations.


Operational Oversight:


	Supervise daily transportation operations, including route planning, scheduling, and dispatch.
	Manage transportation staff, including drivers and support personnel.
	Develop and implement operational procedures and protocols to improve efficiency.


Budgeting and Financial Management:


	Prepare and manage the transport department budget, including cost control and financial reporting.
	Analyze transportation costs and identify opportunities for cost savings.
	Handle procurement of transportation-related goods and services.

Compliance and Safety:


	Ensure compliance with local, state, and federal transportation regulations and standards.
	Implement and monitor safety protocols to ensure the safety of drivers, vehicles, and cargo.
	Manage accident investigations and handle insurance claims.


Customer Service and Communication:


	Address and resolve any transportation-related issues or complaints from clients or internal stakeholders.
	Communicate with clients, suppliers, and other departments to ensure smooth transportation processes.
	Develop and maintain positive relationships with key stakeholders.


Data Management and Reporting:


	Maintain accurate records of transportation activities, vehicle usage, and maintenance.
	Generate and analyze reports on transport performance, costs, and operational efficiency.
	Use data to make informed decisions and improve transportation processes.


Technology Integration:


	Implement and manage transport management systems (TMS) and other relevant technologies.
	Stay updated with the latest industry trends and technological advancements.
	Train staff on the use of new technologies and systems.


Team Leadership and Development:


	Recruit, train, and develop the transport department staff.
	Conduct performance evaluations and provide feedback to team members.
	Foster a positive and productive work environment.


Crisis Management:


	Develop and implement contingency plans for unforeseen disruptions or emergencies.
	Manage logistics during emergencies and ensure minimal impact on operations.


Compliance:


	Stay updated on relevant transportation standards and regulatory changes, ensuring the company&#39;s compliance.
	Collaborate with legal and compliance teams to address regulatory matters.


Training:


	Ensure that all New staff are trained on our processes and procedures and given all support needed to achieve company goals.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;

Transport Admin Manager Job at Brit Properties Nigeria




        
    

        
        Brit Properties Nigeria Limited is a property development company incorporated in Nigeria by Companies and Allied Matters Act. Our primary business interests are land, infrastructure / property development, land survey, property marketing and estate agency. We strive to provide exceptional customer service while offering our clients the best property options. We are committed to making good property decision for both existing and potential clients.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Transport Admin Manager

Job Location: Ajah, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
Strategic Planning and Coordination:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Develop and implement transport strategies aligned with organizational goals.
	Coordinate transportation activities to ensure efficient and cost-effective operations.
	Monitor and evaluate the performance of transport operations and make improvements as necessary.


Fleet Management:


	Oversee the acquisition, maintenance, and management of the company’s vehicle fleet.
	Ensure regular vehicle inspections, maintenance, and repairs are performed.
	Manage vehicle registration, insurance, and compliance with legal and safety regulations.


Operational Oversight:


	Supervise daily transportation operations, including route planning, scheduling, and dispatch.
	Manage transportation staff, including drivers and support personnel.
	Develop and implement operational procedures and protocols to improve efficiency.


Budgeting and Financial Management:


	Prepare and manage the transport department budget, including cost control and financial reporting.
	Analyze transportation costs and identify opportunities for cost savings.
	Handle procurement of transportation-related goods and services.


Section B (Primary Duties & Responsibilities) and Key Performance Indicators 
Compliance and Safety:


	Ensure compliance with local, state, and federal transportation regulations and standards.
	Implement and monitor safety protocols to ensure the safety of drivers, vehicles, and cargo.
	Manage accident investigations and handle insurance claims.


Customer Service and Communication:


	Address and resolve any transportation-related issues or complaints from clients or internal stakeholders.
	Communicate with clients, suppliers, and other departments to ensure smooth transportation processes.
	Develop and maintain positive relationships with key stakeholders.


Data Management and Reporting:


	Maintain accurate records of transportation activities, vehicle usage, and maintenance.
	Generate and analyze reports on transport performance, costs, and operational efficiency.
	Use data to make informed decisions and improve transportation processes.


Technology Integration:


	Implement and manage transport management systems (TMS) and other relevant technologies.
	Stay updated with the latest industry trends and technological advancements.
	Train staff on the use of new technologies and systems.


Team Leadership and Development:


	Recruit, train, and develop the transport department staff.
	Conduct performance evaluations and provide feedback to team members.
	Foster a positive and productive work environment.


Crisis Management:


	Develop and implement contingency plans for unforeseen disruptions or emergencies.
	Manage logistics during emergencies and ensure minimal impact on operations.


Compliance:


	Stay updated on relevant transportation standards and regulatory changes, ensuring the company's compliance.
	Collaborate with legal and compliance teams to address regulatory matters.


Training:


	Ensure that all New staff are trained on our processes and procedures and given all support needed to achieve company goals.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 per month.

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

title: Job Vacancies at DO.II Designs Limited
content:
DO.II Designs Limited focuses on furniture manufacture, interior design, space planning and turn-key remodeling projects for the high-end residential, property development, hospitality and corporate market.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions:

1.) Marketing Manager

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Furniture Manufacturing & Interior Design

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Strategic Brand Positioning & Campaigns: Develop and execute comprehensive marketing campaigns tailored to premium retail clients (B2C) and corporate/real estate developers (B2B) to increase foot traffic, showroom visits, and factory project pipelines.
	Digital Marketing & Content Architecture: Oversee the brand’s digital ecosystem (website, Instagram, LinkedIn, and email newsletters). Direct the creation of visually stunning catalogs, product videos, and lifestyle imagery highlighting our factory’s manufacturing craftsmanship and precision.
	Lead Generation & Sales Pipeline Support: Design targeted lead generation funnels to feed the sales team with high-intent corporate inquiries, interior designer partnerships, architectural collaborations, and retail walk-ins.
	Market Intelligence & Product Strategy: Conduct regular market research within the Lagos and regional Nigerian space to monitor competitor pricing, furniture trends, product demands, and raw material positioning, translating findings into actionable initiatives.
	Showroom & Event Activation Management: Coordinate visual merchandising standards across retail locations and lead the execution of corporate events, open houses, furniture exhibitions, and strategic partnerships within the interior design community.
	Budget Management & Performance Analytics: Establish, track, and report on key metrics (such as Customer Acquisition Cost, Return on Ad Spend, and Lead-to-Conversion rates), optimizing the marketing budget to ensure maximum return on investment.


Requirements


	Education: Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Mass Communication, or a related field. Relevant professional certifications (e.g., NIMN, CIM) are an added advantage.
	Experience: 5–7 years of progressive marketing experience, with at least 2–3 years spent in a managerial capacity. Experience within premium furniture manufacturing, high-end interior design, luxury retail, or real estate development is highly preferred.
	Technical Skills: Proven expertise in digital advertising platforms (Meta Ads Manager, Google Workspace, and LinkedIn Campaign Manager) along with familiarity with CRM and web analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics).
	Competencies: Exceptional written communication skills for storytelling, corporate profiling, and brand copywriting.


Salary
N300,000 - N400,000 monthly. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Marketing Manager” as the subject of the email.

 

 

2.) Project Site Supervisor

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Furniture Manufacturing & Interior Design

Key Responsibilities


	Site Inspection & Pre-Installation Verification: Conduct detailed pre-installation site visits to take accurate final dimensions, check site readiness (wall straightness, floor levels, power points), and cross-check these variables against factory cutting lists to prevent installation errors.
	On-Site Team & Subcontractor Supervision: Supervise and coordinate the daily activities of installers, carpenters, technicians, and casual laborers on-site. Allocate tasks efficiently to maintain high productivity and ensure proper craftsmanship.
	Logistics & Material Management: Oversee the safe offloading and structural handling of finished furniture components at the project site. Cross-check delivered items against the delivery manifest to guarantee no parts, hardware, or components are missing.
	Quality Control & Defect Resolution: Inspect completed installations progressively to ensure perfect finish alignment, seamless joints, sturdy hardware fittings, and zero scratches. Actively log any factory defects or site damages and coordinate swift replacements with the Ikeja production team.
	Timeline Enforcement & Progress Reporting: Monitor project timelines strictly to meet delivery deadlines. Provide daily and weekly structured site progress reports, accompanied by clear photo documentation, to the Project Manager and Head of Production.
	Client & Main-Contractor Relations: Serve as the primary on-site company representative. Address client feedback, handle complaints professionally, and coordinate effectively with main civil contractors, MEP engineers, or site architects to avoid structural clashes.


Requirements


	Education: HND / B.Sc. in Building Technology, Civil Engineering, Architecture, Interior Design, or a related technical discipline.
	Experience: 3–5 years of hands-on experience in site supervision, carpentry installation, fit-out project management, or finishing works within the furniture manufacturing or interior design sectors.
	Technical Skills: Proficient in reading and interpreting complex architectural drawings, structural layouts, assembly diagrams, and 3D floor plans. Highly competent in basic digital tracking tools (WhatsApp reporting, Excel sheets, photo-logging apps).
	Competencies: Strong measurement accuracy skills and deep familiarity with structural site variables (plumb lines, levels, moisture impacts).
	Health & Safety: Solid working knowledge of on-site safety protocols and the strict enforcement of Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) compliance among the site crew.


Salary
N250,000 - N300,000 monthly. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Project Site Supervisor” as the subject of the email.

 

3.) Head of Sales & Strategic Partner

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Furniture Manufacturing & Interior Design
Availability: Immediate Resumption

About the Role


	We are seeking a high-level and visionary Head of Sales & Strategic Partner to drive our revenue growth and market expansion.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for securing high-value commercial and residential projects while building long-term alliances with architects, real estate developers, and corporate clients
	You will lead our sales team, define market strategy, and ensure our manufacturing capabilities perfectly align with premium client demands.


Key Responsibilities


	Strategic Business Development: Identify and penetrate high-growth segments (luxury residential, hospitality, corporate); to increase market share and close high-value contracts for bespoke manufacturing and interior design.
	Partnership Management: Build and maintain a "referral ecosystem" represent the brand at industry exhibitions and design weeks to foster C-suite relationships and create partner incentive programs.
	Sales Leadership & Team Management: Oversee sales and design-consultancy teams by setting clear KPIs; collaborate with Production and Logistics to ensure quality standards; mentor the team in "consultative selling" (selling spaces and experiences rather than just units).
	Market Intelligence & Brand Positioning: Monitor industry trends and competitor pricing; collaborate with Marketing to refine the brand’s value proposition, focusing on craftsmanship and design innovation.


Requirements


	Education: Bachelor’s Degree in Business, Architecture, Interior Design, or a related field (an MBA is an added advantage).
	Experience: Minimum of 8-10 years of sales experience, with at least 5 years in a leadership role within the Furniture, Real Estate, or Luxury Design industry.
	Negotiation: Proven track record of successfully negotiating and closing project deals.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Head of Sales & Strategic Partner” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at Bukka Hut Restaurant
content:
Bukka Hut Restaurant is a fast-growing organization with almost 20 outlets in Lagos and care greatly about our staff. Beyond hospitality, Bukka Hut thrives as a people-centric brand with a laser focus on championing people empowerment initiatives. We like to view our business sectors as channels used to transform the lives of our stakeholders. This stems from our internal workforce to the community we operate in.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Cook

Job Locations: Gbagaba, Yaba, Osolo, and Surulere - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	A Cook plans, prepares, and cooks food items to ensure the highest quality service and experience for customers. They help keep the kitchen organized and running efficiently.
	They ensure proper food handling, sanitation and following food storage procedures.
	Applicant must be able to work at night.


Job Requirements


	Candidates should possess a minimum of SSCE / GCE / NECO qualification.
	1 - 2 years of work experience.
	Good communication skills (Verbal and written).
	Candidates must reside within Mainland and its environment.


Salary
N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more enquiries, send a DM to 08089668354.

 

2.)  Driver

Job Location: Ogudu Ojota, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Driving clients to their desired destinations
	Maintaining the vehicle safe and clean
	Using navigation apps to determine the best route
	Performing inspections of vehicles and equipment
	Assisting with loading and unloading luggage.


Requirement


	Candidates must reside within Ogudu and its environment.


Salary
N100,000 - N106,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more enquiries; DM to 08089668354.

 

3.) Baker

Job Location: Osolo-Oshodi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Ensure profitability by maintaining an accurate record of baking operations.
	Manage needed supplies and inventory levels.
	Direct and supervise the production staff’s activities to make sure that products are up to standards.
	Decorate baked products using glaze, icing and other toppings to achieve a finished appearance.
	Assess the quality of raw materials before baking.
	Conduct research to develop original recipes for products.
	Ensure the proper storage of baking utensils.


Salary
N90,000 - N97,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more enquiries; DM to 08089668354.    

    

        Click here to Apply
